title: alangium longiflorum var. hirsutum
intro: Alangium longiflorum var. hirsutum, also known as hairy alangium or hairy alang, is a plant species belonging to the family Alangiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Alangium longiflorum var. hirsutum is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves, bark, and roots are used to make medicinal tea, tinctures, and extracts.
